name: Maxell Holdings, Ltd.
summary: Maxell Holdings, Ltd., through its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells energy products, industrial materials, and electronic appliances and consumer products in Japan and internationally. The company offers primary batteries, including heat-resistant coin-type lithium manganese dioxide, coin-type lithium manganese dioxide, cylindrical-type lithium manganese dioxide, lithium thionyl chloride, silver oxide, and thin flexible batteries; rechargeable batteries, such as prismatic-type, laminate-type, and coin-type lithium ion batteries, as well as button-type rechargeable and sulfide-based all-solid-state batteries; battery chargers and packs; and electrodes for batteries, as well as oxygen sensors and hydrogen gas generators. It also provides optical components, molding dies and plastic molding, precision components, adhesive tapes, functional materials, electroforming, RFID systems, IC cards, and industrial rubber products. In addition, the company offers projectors and imaging equipment; health, beauty care, and other small electronic appliances; audio equipment, including headphones, speakers, computer peripherals, other accessories; optical discs, USB memory and flash memory products, and cassette tapes; alkaline dry, manganese dry, and mobile batteries; and battery operated and other hydraulic tools. Further, it generates and sells solar power. The company was formerly known as Hitachi Maxell, Ltd. and changed its name to Maxell Holdings, Ltd. in October 2017. Maxell Holdings, Ltd. was incorporated in 1947 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
